title: peucedanum chabraei
intro: Peucedanum chabraei, also known as Chhabra's or Kuth, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayas and the Indian subcontinent. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Peucedanum chabraei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are used to treat various ailments.
